nasb.text: And I say to you, make friends for yourselves by means of the wealth of unrighteousness, so that when it fails, they will receive you into the eternal dwellings.

esv.text: And I tell you, make friends for yourselves by means of unrighteous wealth,  so that when it fails they may receive you into the eternal dwellings.

cnv.text: 我告訴你們，要用不義的錢財去結交朋友，好叫錢財無用的時候，他們可以接你們到永恆的帳棚裡。

ccb.text: “我告诉你们，要善用今世的钱财，广结朋友。这样，当钱财不管用时，他们会接你们到永远的居所。

csbs.text: 我告诉你们：要藉着那不义的财富为自己结交朋友，这样当财富无用的时候，你们会被接到永恒的居所里。
